revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}ifsubst|1=|2=}}{{{1|{{{2|}}}}}}{{Script/basic documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}ifsubst|1=|2=}}{{{1|{{{2|}}}}}}{{Script/basic documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}ifsubst|1=|2=}}{{{1|{{{2|}}}}}}{{Script/basic documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
